mission_08: WITH ranked AS (SELECT c.customer_id, c.name, o.order_id, o.order_date, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.customer_id ORDER BY o.order_date DESC) AS rn FROM customers c INNER JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id) SELECT customer_id, name, order_id, order_date FROM ranked WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY name;
